title: Monday Form google Fonts
excerpt:
Hello all! 
We integrated a monday form into our website with an iframe this is a super nice feature but 
Is there a way to deactivate the google fonts in this form? 
Our privacy policy don’t allow this.

posts.author: SvenSchiemann (Sven Schiemann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all!

We integrated a monday form into our website with an iframe this is a super nice feature but
Is there a way to deactivate the google fonts in this form?

Our privacy policy don’t allow this.
